Task History

Autozod Task History

Search tasks by date or Order ID, view the full status timeline and agent request log, verify pickup and delivery proof photos, and download task data.

System Autozod
Role Ops / Support
Updated March 2026
← Hub ↑ Autozod Overview Filter by Date Search by Order ID View History Proof Photos Download
Overview

Task History Page

Task History is the complete log of every delivery task. Use it to audit orders, inspect agent assignments, verify proof photos, and export records.

💡
Navigation: Autozod top nav → Task history
Default state — no date range selected shows "No Tasks". Select a date range or search by Order ID to load records.
Page Overview
Total (top right)
All-time task count — not filtered by date.
Default state
Shows "No Tasks" until a date range is selected or an Order ID is searched.
Filtering

Filter by Date Range

Load all tasks within a specific period using the dual-month date picker.

Date range picker — click start date then end date. Table loads automatically once both dates are selected.
Using the Date Picker
Open picker
Click the date field showing Choose date range.
Select range
Click a start date, then an end date. Selected range highlights in blue.
Navigate months
‹/› one month · «/» one year.
Auto-load
Table loads immediately once both dates are set. No separate Apply button.
Searching

Search by Order ID

Find a specific task instantly by entering the Hyperzod Order ID.

Order ID search results — all tasks matching the searched ID, showing Order ID, Auto badge, Created At, Pickup, Drop, Agent, Status, and Action.
Search Steps
Order ID field
Enter the exact Order ID number into the Order ID box (right side of toolbar).
Search button
Click blue Search. Filters to matching order(s).
Clear search
Clear the field and click Search to return to the full date-filtered list.
Inspecting

View Task History & Status

Expand any task row to see full delivery details, status timeline, and driver assignment request history.

Expanding a Task
👁 eye icon
Click the eye icon in the Action column to expand the task detail panel below the row.
Status tab — chronological timeline: CREATED → AWAITING → ASSIGNED → PICKED_UP → COMPLETED, with exact timestamps.
Requests tab — all drivers offered this task with their response status (EXPIRED / ACCEPTED) and expiry time. Shows how Autozod auto-assigned the order.
Detail Panel — Left Side
Pickup
Merchant name, contact, and full pickup address.
Drop
Customer name, contact, and full delivery address.
Distance
Route distance in miles.
Time
Estimated delivery time in minutes.
Driver Commission
Amount paid to the driver for this task.
History Tabs
Status tab
Full status timeline with timestamps: CREATED → AWAITING → ASSIGNED → PICKED_UP → COMPLETED.
Requests tab
Every driver offered the task, their response (EXPIRED/ACCEPTED), and when the request timed out. Shows Autozod's auto-assignment sequence.
Proof

View Pickup & Delivery Proof

Each completed task has a driver photo taken at pickup and delivery to confirm the order was collected and delivered.

Accessing Proof Photos
Pickup Proof
In the expanded task panel, click the blue View Image link next to Pickup Proof.
Delivery Proof
Click View Image next to Delivery Proof.
Close
Click Close to dismiss the photo modal.
Pickup Proof — driver's photo taken at the merchant location confirming collection.
Delivery Proof — driver's photo at the customer's address confirming delivery.
Export

Download Task History

Export all task data for the selected date range as a CSV file.

Download confirmation — click OK to download all task data for the selected date range as a CSV file.
Steps
1. Set date range
Always select a date range first — downloads without a range will be empty.
2. Click Download
Click the blue Download button next to the date picker.
3. Confirm
Click OK in the confirmation dialog. CSV downloads automatically.
What's included
Order ID, timestamps, pickup/drop details, agent, status, distance, time, driver commission.
